# 白泽 — 跨领域建造者，把成败都讲透

> 独立做产品的人。这里是我的项目、踩过的坑，和能帮到你的东西。不贩卖焦虑，少废话多出货。

This is a bilingual (English / 中文) personal site. English pages are under /en/, Chinese under /zh/.

## Key pages (English)
- [Home](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/): Who I am, what I do, and how to work with me.
- [About](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/about/): Background, focus areas, and credibility.
- [Projects](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/projects/): Proof-of-work: what I've designed, built, and shipped.
- [Writing](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/posts/): Technical essays and founder notes.
- [Now](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/now/): What I'm currently building and thinking about.
- [Work with me](https://baize-lab.github.io/en/work-with-me/): Collaboration, advisory, and how to reach me.

## 主要页面 (中文)
- [Home](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/): Who I am, what I do, and how to work with me.
- [About](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/about/): Background, focus areas, and credibility.
- [Projects](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/projects/): Proof-of-work: what I've designed, built, and shipped.
- [Writing](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/posts/): Technical essays and founder notes.
- [Now](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/now/): What I'm currently building and thinking about.
- [Work with me](https://baize-lab.github.io/zh/work-with-me/): Collaboration, advisory, and how to reach me.

## Notes
- Author: 白泽
